mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, username, password, role FROM member
SELECT id, name, email, username, password, role FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, email, username, password, role FROM member WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(id, name, email, username, password, role) VALUES(#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, #{username}, #{password}, #{role})
